name: Marketing Cloud Release Notes – 13 Sep 2022
body: [{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Overview","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"We are excited to have made your archiving simpler. In this release, we bring you better Archive management. Also, Dynamic Content now exhibits a revamped index page."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"To learn more, read on!"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Enhancement","bold":true}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"Improved Archive Management","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Marketing Cloud now enables you to see and manage all your archived items in one place. For more information, see "},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/Archive-Management","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"Archive Management","bold":true}]},{"text":"."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"In Navigation, go to ARCHIVE to access the Archives page. The page displays all the archived items that can also be filtered based on the item type; for example, content or contact list. You can unarchive and delete an archived item using the Actions drop-down menu on this page."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/ArchivesPage.0685g000009tmh8AAA.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/ArchivesPage.0685g000009tmh8AAA.png","name":"Archives Page","embedType":"image","float":"none","height":1318,"width":2560}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"The archive functionality is available for "},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/Campaign-Tags","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"Campaign Tag","bold":true}]},{"text":", "},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/Introduction-to-Contact-Lists","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"Contact List","bold":true}]},{"text":", "},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/Managing-Email-Content","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"Content","bold":true}]},{"text":", "},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/Introduction-to-Segments","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"Segment","bold":true}]},{"text":", and "},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/Dynamic-Content","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"Dynamic Content","bold":true}]},{"text":". On the index page of the items supporting archiving, you'll notice a new button – VIEW ARCHIVES – that takes you to the Archives page as well."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/ArchiveContent.0685g000009tmiDAAQ.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/ArchiveContent.0685g000009tmiDAAQ.png","name":"Archive - Content","embedType":"image","float":"none","height":1424,"width":2560}},{"type":"blockquote","children":[{"type":"blockquote-line","children":[{"text":"Note","bold":true},{"text":": Use the Archive option from the Actions drop-down menu to archive an item."}]}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"Revamped Dynamic Content Index Page","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"The Dynamic Content index page is now revamped as per our design standards. To learn about Dynamic Content, see "},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/Dynamic-Content","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"Dynamic Content","bold":true}]},{"text":"."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/DynamicContentIndexPage.0685g000009tmgjAAA.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/DynamicContentIndexPage.0685g000009tmgjAAA.png","name":"Dynamic Content Index Page","embedType":"image","float":"none","height":1254,"width":2560}}]}]
